posts.author: CleanUpPhillyTrump24
posts.title: "H-1B Visa Applications Crash 38% After Trump Reforms... According to the reports, new data from USCIS shows a 38.5 percent drop in properly submitted H-1B registrations for the 2027 fiscal year. Applications fell from 343,981 to just 211,600 in a single year." -- Groundwork for abolition of H1-Bs.

link_metadata.description: A dramatic collapse in H-1B visa applications is being hailed as long-overdue proof that one of the most controversial pipelines of foreign labor into the United States is finally being brought under control.
link_metadata.title: H-1B Visa Applications Crash 38% After Trump Reforms | The Gateway Pundit | by Robert Semonsen

posts.title: ABC wants the FCC to consider “The View” as News so they can continue anti-Trump lefty slanted coverage to their heart’s content. FCC asks the public to comment.
